title: ‘I’m not happy with the UK’: Donald Trump criticizes Keir Starmer over military access
summary_full: President Trump has sharply criticized UK Prime Minister Starmer for initially withholding UK bases for US strikes on Iran, stating the "special relationship" has weakened. Starmer later agreed to limited defensive use of two bases after a UK base in Cyprus was attacked. The UK emphasizes acting on a legal basis and in its national interest, recalling Iraq war lessons.
